targets.rawSql: SELECT captured_at AS time, processed_messages::double precision AS value, 'processed_messages' AS metric FROM stage5_metrics_snapshots WHERE $__timeFilter(captured_at) UNION ALL SELECT captured_at AS time, extractions_total::double precision AS value, 'extractions_total' AS metric FROM stage5_metrics_snapshots WHERE $__timeFilter(captured_at) UNION ALL SELECT captured_at AS time, expensive_backlog::double precision AS value, 'expensive_backlog' AS metric FROM stage5_metrics_snapshots WHERE $__timeFilter(captured_at) ORDER BY time

SELECT captured_at AS time, extraction_errors_1h::double precision AS value, 'errors_1h' AS metric FROM stage5_metrics_snapshots WHERE $__timeFilter(captured_at) UNION ALL SELECT captured_at AS time, analysis_cost_usd_1h::double precision AS value, 'llm_cost_usd_1h' AS metric FROM stage5_metrics_snapshots WHERE $__timeFilter(captured_at) ORDER BY time
